# Pull Request

## Summary

Briefly describe what this PR adds, changes, or fixes.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Documentation fix (typo, broken link, clarity improvement)
- [ ] New document or section
- [ ] New example file
- [ ] New diagram
- [ ] Framework update (requires discussion in an issue first)
- [ ] Other: ___

## Related Issue

Closes # (issue number, if applicable)

## Files Changed

List the key files added or modified:

- `docs/...`
- `examples/...`

## Checklist

- [ ] Content is safe for public sharing (no proprietary data, credentials, or internal system names)
- [ ] Follows naming conventions in `docs/05-copilot-implementation/naming-conventions.md`
- [ ] Follows markdown standards in `docs/05-copilot-implementation/markdown-standards.md`
- [ ] New example files end in `.example.md`
- [ ] Diagrams use `.mmd` format in `examples/diagrams/`
- [ ] No changes to `docs/01-principles/` without prior discussion
- [ ] PR title is clear and descriptive

## Additional Notes

Anything reviewers should know before reading the diff.
